description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent display screen on the front, illuminated with the word 'PLAY' and a play icon. The cabinet is decorated with a dynamic, abstract pattern in shades of blue, pink, and white, giving it a vibrant, retro aesthetic. The control panel is equipped with a single joystick and three round buttons, all in a bright red color, suggesting a single-player setup. The sides of the cabinet are angled, with the control panel jutting out for ergonomic access, and the back is a solid, unadorned gray. The top section, where a marquee would typically be, is present but only subtly colored, lacking any distinct artwork or branding. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or MDF with a painted or laminated finish, and the screen is likely an LCD given its flatness and modern glow.
description: A retro-style upright arcade game cabinet with a vibrant blue, pink, and white abstract pattern, a glowing 'PLAY' screen, and a red joystick with three buttons on the control panel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled cabinet profile, abstract blue and pink graphics, and the protruding control panel with visible joystick and buttons.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the large screen with 'PLAY' text, the red joystick and buttons, and the full width of the control panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the left, with the same abstract graphics and control panel visible from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid gray back panel with no visible features or graphics.
attribute_screen_type: LCD, flat, medium size, with a visible bezel and glowing display
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick on the left and three red buttons arranged in a row to the right; no visible markings or labels.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Abstract, swirling blue, pink, and white pattern with no specific imagery or branding.
